label: 图像输出
description: 将 image alias 写入全局资产库（raw 区），支持自定义名称与标签。名称留空则自动生成。
description-en: Save an image alias into the shared asset library (raw zone). Supports custom name and tags.

inputs.name: image
inputs.label: 图像
inputs.description-en: Image alias to save into the library.

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: 名称
inputs.description: 写入资产库时使用的 alias 名称，留空则自动生成 image_output_<时间戳>
inputs.description-en: Alias name used in the asset library. Leave empty to auto-generate image_output_<timestamp>.

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: 标签
inputs.description: 写入资产库时附加的标签列表（可选）
inputs.description-en: Optional tags to attach when saving.

outputs.name: alias
outputs.label: alias
outputs.description: 写入后在资产库中的最终 alias；入库失败时为空字符串
outputs.description-en: Final alias in the asset library after writing; empty string if the write failed.

params.name: overwrite
params.label: 覆盖同名
params.description: alias 已存在时覆盖旧资产；关闭后自动追加时间戳后缀
params.description-en: Overwrite existing asset if alias already exists; when off, a timestamp suffix is appended.
